response:
To find the **characteristic polynomial** of a matrix $ A $, we compute the determinant of the matrix $ A - \lambda I $, where $ I $ is the identity matrix of the same size as $ A $.

Given matrix:

$$
A = \begin{pmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8}
\end{pmatrix}
$$

We compute:

$$
A - \lambda I = \begin{pmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} - \lambda & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} - \lambda & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8} - \lambda
\end{pmatrix}
$$

Now we compute the determinant of this matrix:

$$
\det(A - \lambda I) = \begin{vmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} - \lambda & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} - \lambda & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8} - \lambda
\end{vmatrix}
$$

We will compute this determinant step by step.

---
